lint.command: set -a; [ -f ./.env ] && . ./.env; set +a; cargo fmt --check && cargo clippy --bin toggl -- -D warnings

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Strengthen cli-worker handoff rules for “already implemented” features: require citing the actual implementing commit/diff or creating a narrowly scoped follow-up commit with reviewable evidence before marking the feature complete.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: All three workspace-admin-config feature reviews found handoffs tied to commit 5627432, which only changes entry-surface behavior and does not match two migration features or the config-default feature.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add mission/shared-state guidance for cases where required behavior already exists in earlier commits, clarifying whether workers should reuse the original implementing commit, reopen the feature, or create a dedicated evidence commit.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The project-tag-client-resource-migration review explicitly found no shared-state instruction for how to complete a feature when the code already landed earlier, which led to mismatched commit evidence.

rejectedObservations.observation: Document config-derived defaults and override behavior in .factory/library/environment.md.
rejectedObservations.reason: environment.md is reserved for environment and external dependency facts; config-default behavior belongs in a different library file and was not concrete enough to apply automatically from these reviews.
